zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bradley於1591年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾約克時，他的父親Thomas Bradley26歲，母親Cybbell Greenwood22歲。他於1611年11月26日與Gertrude Watson在英國英格蘭越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bradley于1591年出生在英国英格兰越可爾約克时，他的父亲Thomas Bradley26岁，母亲Cybbell Greenwood22岁。他于1611年11月26日与Gertrude Watson在英国英格兰越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Bradley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places throughout England named Bradley, from Old English brād ‘broad’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Scottish: habitational name from Braidlie in Roxburghshire.
Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó Brolcháin ‘descendant of Brolacháin’, a diminutive of the personal name Brólach, compare Brawley . This was a learned family.

variants.name: Brawley
meanings: Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Brólaigh ‘descendant of Brolach’, a personal name possibly derived from brollach ‘breast’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bradley was born in 1591, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Bradley, was 26 and his mother, Cybbell Greenwood, was 22. He married Gertrude Watson on 26 November 1611, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bradley est né en 1591, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Bradley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Cybbell Greenwood, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Gertrude Watson le 26 novembre 1611, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bradley 1591 in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Bradley 26 und seine Mutter Cybbell Greenwood 22. Er hat am 26. it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bradley è nato il nel 1591 nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Bradley, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Cybbell Greenwood, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Gertrude Watson il 26 novembre 1611, nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie.

ko.lifeSummary: William Bradley(이)가 1591년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Bradley(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Cybbell Greenwood(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1611년 11월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 Gertrude Watson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다.
